old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-75kf","title":"Exclude TX airtime from queue latency","description":"TxQueue.confirm_transmitted samples latency after Radio.transmit completes, so max_latency_ms and avg_latency_ms include on-air transmit duration rather than only queue wait, contrary to appendix-bufferbloat metric semantics.
